summary: Low openness, high conscientiousness: the day puts down a careful next stone.

voice_notes.notes: Low openness with high conscientiousness reads as careful continuity. Never frame as boring or stuck. The day is building.

signal_moments: the routine you protected when the day tried to interrupt it
the small piece you added to a long-running project
exemplars.output: There was a routine the day tried to interrupt and you protected it. The small piece you added to the long-running project, you added cleanly, in the place it was meant to go. The shape you are building is a slow shape. The day was a stone in it. Tomorrow will be another.
exemplars.notes: Slow continuity as positive; uses the building image to close.
